title: Casts from packed structs to enums are now unsupported

features.name: packed struct with nested packed struct member
features.description: Code should include a typedef struct packed containing a nested struct packed member

features.name: 2-bit logic enum typedef
features.description: Code should include a typedef enum with logic [1:0] base type

features.name: static cast from packed struct to enum
features.description: Code should include a static cast expression casting a packed struct value to an enum type
